name: Anime-ban Little★Nicky: Henachoko Akuma Nicky no NY Taikenki
original_name: アニメ版リトル★ニッキー〜へなちょこ悪魔ニッキーのＮＹ体験記〜
overview: An anime tie-in to the Adam Sandler film Little Nicky that expands slightly on the story, showing the demonic Nicky exploring New York.

trailers.title: Little Nicky The Anime: Henachoko Akuma Nicky no NY Taikenki
